name: Strawberry Leather
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pureed berries and applesauce with lemon juice and sugar.
2. Line a 10x15 inch jelly roll pan with plastic wrap.
3. Pour the fruit mixture into the pan and spread evenly.
4. Bake for about 5 hours at 200°F, or until the leather pulls away from the plastic wrap.
5. Carefully flip the leather onto a counter. Peel away the plastic wrap and remove any mixture that has not set.
6. Cut into slices and wrap each slice in plastic.
Source: Sun Newspaper clipping June 28/93 from The Garden (U-pick farm) booklet, shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Calgary, Alberta
